foyer.description: A small entry space with a bulletin board and a bench. A hallway leads deeper in.

mirror_hall.description: A corridor lined with old mirrors; some are fogged or cracked. Footsteps echo here.

stage_room.description: A tiny stage with curtains and a spotlight. Props are scattered near the wings.

workshop.description: A cluttered workbench with safe tools and labeled drawers. Everything smells like sawdust.
